# IChromeStyle.SetWindowOpacity method

Set [`WindowOpacity`](./WindowOpacity.md) for the active theme's preset (clamped to [0.3, 1]). Persists + fires [`ActiveChanged`](../INamedTheme/ActiveChanged.md) so the window chrome rebakes.

```csharp
public void SetWindowOpacity(float opacity)
```
